| 44    | Can we please add into the service calendars where people can purchase a package deal where they pay for a 4 treatment option (think massage package) and it shows in their account that they have used one of their prepaid sessions and it shows that they have 3 sessions left that have already been paid for. They would then be able to schedule their next appointment and it pull from their account balance to move them to 2 treatments left available on their account. This way we can get the service industry into having these options like Vagaro. I know we can set up a service calendar, but when one purchases a package, it seems that there is no way to view how many treatments they have left when purchasing a bundle. | open         |
